content_of_post_to_answer: My son forgets everything he studies and has no interest in learning. What can I do to improve his memory and focus?
answer: One thing parents often miss: forgetting isn’t always a memory problem. It can be a signal that the material never became meaningful in the first place. Many children are asked to remember information before they’ve become curious about it. Instead of focusing on memory techniques, watch when your son naturally pays attention. Attention is usually the doorway to memory, not the other way around.
